name: Kaplan Law Firm, LLC
description_short: Kaplan Law Firm, LLC is a credit repair provider based in Chicago, Illinois. Rated 4.6/5 with 66 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Kaplan Law Firm, LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Chicago, Illinois. Carrying a 4.6/5.0 Google rating from 66 reviews, Kaplan Law Firm, LLC has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Chicago area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a attorney, bankruptcy attorney, bankruptcy service, Kaplan Law Firm, LLC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Chicago, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Kaplan Law Firm, LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Chicago, Illinois area who are considering Kaplan Law Firm, LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
